core_rule: A handoff bundle must be task-bounded, public-safe, and explicit about what it is enough for and what it is not.

profiles.enough_for: first serious orientation, anti-confusion boundaries, claim overview, and public-safe scoping
profiles.not_enough_for: doctrinal sign-off, audit review, or runtime judgment
profiles.public_safe_note: Contains only public-safe control surfaces and no private or runtime-sensitive material.

profiles.enough_for: theoretical architecture review across AGI, SER, and L4
profiles.not_enough_for: evidence or compliance sign-off, runtime closure review, or bounded partner scoping by itself
profiles.public_safe_note: Uses only public doctrinal and theoretical artifacts already published in the corpus.

profiles.enough_for: citable claim carriers, evidence posture, verification route, and frozen-reading discipline
profiles.not_enough_for: whole-corpus philosophical understanding or narrative interpretation
profiles.public_safe_note: Limited to public citable and verification-bearing artifacts; no private operational traces are included.

profiles.enough_for: runtime role clarity, closure evidence, and L4 constraint context
profiles.not_enough_for: doctrinal completeness, governance review, or whole-corpus authority claims
profiles.public_safe_note: Bounded to public skeleton and proof surfaces; it does not expose live runtime or unsafe code.

profiles.primary_use: bounded external handoff for maintainers, reviewers, or corpus stewards
profiles.enough_for: bounded corpus routing, handoff selection, and control-layer review
profiles.not_enough_for: creating new doctrine, bypassing primary artifacts, or reclassifying unsafe material by implication
profiles.public_safe_note: Consists only of public corpus-control surfaces and explicit boundary rules.

profiles.enough_for: companion-bounded human recognition, narrative role clarity, and anti-confusion context
profiles.not_enough_for: normative verification, audit evidence, or runtime certification
profiles.public_safe_note: Uses only public companion and control surfaces and keeps the companion explicitly bounded.

profiles.primary_use: bounded partnership or institutional scoping handoff
profiles.enough_for: partnership scoping, maturity and evidence orientation, and proof-of-possibility context
profiles.not_enough_for: full compliance sign-off, deep doctrinal arbitration, or whole-corpus philosophical completeness
profiles.public_safe_note: All included artifacts are already public-safe and suitable for bounded public evaluation.

profiles.enough_for: targeted skeptical review, objection routing, and non-straw challenge setup
profiles.not_enough_for: replacing canonical reading order or declaring whole-corpus invalid without primary-artifact review
profiles.public_safe_note: Keeps criticism within public-safe control and doctrinal surfaces and excludes unsafe or off-limits domains.

fail_closed_rule: If maintainers cannot determine which export profile fits a request, default to the smaller public-safe bundle and state the limit explicitly.
